articles.title: Ethereum (ETH) Price to Drop to $1,200 After Fed Rate Cuts As Institutions Sell
articles.description: Although the Ethereum (ETH) price has bounced back above $2,350 levels, market analysts believe that ETH is not completely out of the woods. Historical chart patterns for the ETH price show that the upcoming Fed rate cuts could be a nightmare for the altcoins. Ethereum Price Can Drop to $1,200 Following Fed Rate Cuts Crypto […]

articles.title: Ethereum Name Service integrated with PayPal, Venmo for crypto transfers
articles.description: The integration allows Venmo and PayPal users to transfer cryptocurrency using simple ENS names, replacing long wallet addresses.

articles.title: 3 Possible Reasons Behind Bitcoin’s $4K Daily Surge
articles.description: BTC briefly exceeded $58,000 on Monday evening for the first time since last Thursday.

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Ended Longest Negative Outflow Streak as BTC Soared to $58K
articles.description: Monday was the first day in two weeks that the ETFs saw positive numbers coming in.
